tagline: Expert Pool & Landscaping Care in Peoria, AZ

hero.headline: Your Pool & Yard, One Trusted Team
hero.subheadline: Brian Beckman and his crew handle everything from weekly pool care to full landscape transformations across Vistancia and greater Peoria. One call, one team, zero headaches -- just a backyard you actually love.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care & Landscaping<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Most companies do pools or yards. We handle both, so your entire outdoor space stays beautiful without juggling multiple vendors.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Water chemistry testing, skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready, guaranteed.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, automation, and plumbing -- we diagnose and fix it right. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Green Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Algae-filled nightmare? We restore green pools to pristine condition in days, including acid wash and deep cleaning. Emergency response available.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Install
cards.description: Desert-smart landscaping from concept to completion -- pavers, fire pits, lighting, turf, plants, and retaining walls that thrive in Arizona heat.

cards.title: Lawn & Landscape Care
cards.description: Ongoing mowing, edging, weed control, tree trimming, seasonal cleanups, and gravel maintenance to keep your yard looking sharp year-round.

cards.title: Irrigation Services
cards.description: Drip systems, sprinkler installs, repairs, and leak detection. We keep every plant hydrated efficiently -- even in the Sonoran Desert.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Beautiful Backyard

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Call or fill out the form and describe your pool or landscaping needs. Brian will personally follow up with a free, no-pressure estimate within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Get to Work
steps.description: Our trained crew arrives on schedule and handles everything -- pool care, equipment repairs, landscaping, irrigation. You get real-time service reports through our client portal.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Backyard
steps.description: Your pool sparkles, your yard looks incredible, and you never had to lift a finger. Not satisfied? We come back and make it right at no charge.

about.label: Why Vistancia Trusts Us
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Community-Rooted, Quality-Obsessed
about.description: Brian Beckman built Pool & Landscaping of Vistancia from the ground up right here in Peoria. As a local Vistancia resident, Brian personally oversees every job and treats each property like his own. With 51 five-star reviews and nine years serving the community, this is not a franchise or a faceless crew -- it is your neighbor taking care of your backyard.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Brian personally ensures every pool and landscape job meets his standards before the crew leaves your property.

features.title: One Company, Both Services
features.description: Pool care and landscaping under one roof means fewer vendors, better communication, and a backyard that works together.

features.title: Real-Time Service Reports
features.description: Access your client portal for service history, photos, and chemical readings. You always know exactly what was done.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your needs. Financing available through Wisetack -- no contracts, cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Backyard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call Brian directly and we will come back and redo it at no charge. No forms, no runaround. We have built our reputation on doing right by our neighbors, and we plan to keep it that way.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call Brian and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do you handle both pools and landscaping?
faqs.answer: Yes -- that is our specialty. We are one of the few companies in the West Valley that offers comprehensive pool care and full landscaping services under one roof, saving you time and money.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and we handle everything. You will receive a real-time service report through our client portal after every visit.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we partner with Wisetack to offer flexible financing options for larger projects like equipment replacements, landscape installations, and pool renovations. Apply in minutes with no impact to your credit score.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Peoria (85382, 85383), Vistancia, Trilogy at Vistancia, Surprise, Glendale, North Phoenix, Sun City, Anthem, and surrounding West Valley communities.

testimonials.name: Long-time Pool Owner
testimonials.text: Brian Beckman is the best pool company we have ever used in our 30 years as a pool owner. He is dependable and very knowledgeable about pool and yard-related issues.

testimonials.name: Vistancia Homeowner
testimonials.text: Brian and his team did an amazing job cleaning up our front yard. The team was friendly and professional during a huge cleanup, with results so fantastic we immediately set up continuous service. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Peoria Resident
testimonials.text: Brian was extremely helpful and kind when we made a costly mistake, offering solutions that no one else had mentioned. He was very diligent, knowledgeable, and easy to work with. 10 out of 10 recommendation.
